command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
export PATH="$PATH:/home/jose/.local/bin"

echo '===F: TEST DISCOVERY AND EXACT COUNTS==='
echo '--- all test files ---'
ls tests/test_*.py
echo '--- collected items per file ---'
python3 -m pytest tests/ --collect-only -q 2>&1 | grep '::' | sed 's/::.*/:/' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
echo '--- TOTAL collected ---'
python3 -m pytest tests/ --collect-only -q 2>&1 | tail -3

echo '===G: EXACT TEST RUN (fresh, all suites)==='
python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=no -q 2>&1 | tail -8

ENDSSH
